reviews.review_description:
Update 7/2/25
What happened? Was this abandoned? Was 5 stars because of the potential… but apparently they didn’t wanna reach that potential, therefore I’ve reduced it to 3 stars
  

This game had me hooked within a couple mins. The it’s Elven Assassin but with firearms instead. 

Couple of gripes: 1) it’s kinda difficult to teleport to a different location. Takes way too long to point at just the right spot, meanwhile the enemies are running past me.
2) that goes into my next gripe, the weapon quick-menu wheel. It’s constantly picking the wrong gun. I pick the shotgun, the pistols load up… I pick the rifle, the grenade launcher is chosen.  Just make that more crisp so it’s quick and easy to use. 
3) and finally, the grenade launcher shoots WAY too far. Maybe add some iron sights so I can better aim?

Just a quick suggestion as well: please add weapon upgrades and more weapons to buy. It’ll help the game from becoming stale.  I need to feel like there’s a reason to play, and upgrades are a great method. It’s why roguelites are so popular.  Maybe add some in-round abilities as well? I’ve only made it to Wave 23 so many laser sites or more bullets is offered later on? 

Either way, the base of the game is stellar. It’s gonna be a top selling game when this is finished. Glad I got in on the ground floor :)

I gifted my friends this game. It gets extremely intense as you progress. If you think this game is easy on the first 20 waves you are totally wrong lol As you keep playing, oh my goodness so many zombies you be grateful to have friends to help you. 

Good price too. Elvin assassins was great but you're so limited with a bow and arrow and it's only four player co-op except 8 player versus only. This game not only you have bow and arrows but you also have guns that includes twin revolvers, shotgun, hunting rifle and a grenade launcher (for better accuracy, use two hands for the grenade launcher unless you think you're super cool then more power to you then use one hand but good luck with Aiming)

Overall, you don't get any motion sickness for people who are sensitive. Just be sure to shift left analog stick down to teleport to another station. And don't forget to duck or Dodge if an enemy throws an item at you. Yeah, can definitely play up to eight players instead of four players.

I love this game but has some bugs, teleporting can be glitchy.
That aside this isbrilliant, hardly anyone goes on this which is a shame, defo more fun with a team.  
Elven Assassin is awesome, this could be better imo.

reviews.review_title: Trigger sticks and won't fire bullets
reviews.review_description: When playing this game the guns can load, but trigger to fire won't work. Not impressed.
Simple, Below average effort

Love the concept of a zombie shooter set in the old west with old west style weapons.  
This game still needs a lot of work, but it is still a lot of fun!  The four different locations are fantastic.   Suggestions: For the gun wheel, have us press the "A" button to bring the wheel up, then point at which weapon we want then let go of the "A" button and it's in our hands.  To many times while fighting the horde, my thumb or finger just lightly touches the right thumb stick and I suddenly have the wrong weapon in hand.  VERY FRUSTRSATING.  Many games have the press button to bring the wheel up.  (Survival Nation) Can't wait for this game to be finished!  You have a winner in this game. 

Your web page mentions new moses like PVP and where you are in a house and have to stop them from getting in, with free movement.  When will this be happening in this game?

reviews.review_title: Game Needs Work - Feedback for Dev Team
reviews.review_description:
So our whole family played Elven Archers.  We own 5 VR headsets and have purchased Elven Archers for all 5 + Expansion Pack for all 5, just to give some background. 

This new game has a TON of potential, more than any other VR game I've seen.  I understand that it is still in development, but if a few tweaks were made I'd be getting everyone that I know to buy it because the concept is a lot of fun.

So let's break down the good:

1) Gun selection and weapon dynamics are solid.  Though the rifle is everyone's go-to after playing through them all.  Pistols and grenade gun need to do a bit more damage while the rifle is overpowered as it sits.  The shotgun is totally useless if you can get the loading mechanism to function.

2) Zombies spawn at a good pace through level progression and the character sounds and mechanics are on point.  I.E. when they throw dynamite at you, you can blast it out of the sky.

3) The levels are absolutely stunning for a VR game.

Now the bad:

1) The zombie types are very limited.  It's almost like if you've seen one, you've seen them all.  I get some are a little faster, some throw, etc. but overall, they kind of blend together, and they all die the same.

2) There really aren't any "bosses" in this game. Occasionally, you'll get a large creature spawn but they aren't even remotely challenging and don't do anything that would otherwise make you have to focus on them rather than your main zombie targets.  The troll map in Elven Archers is the best of all the maps because it gives you something different and challenging to work on, though that game too is lacking in overall boss type critters. 

3) Game increases in difficulty but SLOWLY.  My wife, stepdaughter and I got to wave 54 on one map before we were sick of playing because it was just the same thing over and over without any real challenge unless one of us was killed.  We stopped at that wave with 100% health because it was too redundant and not challenging. 

4) As mentioned in the above comments, the guns are cool but require balancing. The blast radius and actual damage dealt by the grenade gun needs to be increased since it has to be reloaded every shot.  The shotgun is essentially unusable and useless. The rifle is overpowered while the pistols and bow are underpowered.  The gatling gun mechanism also needs review as it is difficult to keep that moving.

Suggestions for the dev team:

1) Fix the gun issue.  We shouldn't all just want to use the rifle.

2) Place a handful of "towers" at ground level.  This would add heightened intensity and risk to users while giving a unique vantage point.

3) Add bosses to the maps and make them more challenging. Spice up the differences in the zombie mix.

4) Use a better leveling system.   Spending money earned on cosmetic gear is boring and lame.  Elven Archers is decent, this one needs work!

Please please please add/fix these so I can love this game!

developer_response.body: Hello - thank you so much for taking the time to share all your thoughts and feedback. We always deeply appreciate any remarks, especially when the feedback is so constructive and complex. To address some of your points, I'd like to let you know that adding new bosses and towers is possible to do, so I will let my team know. We will also deeply consider your suggestions regarding adjusting the leveling system. Last but not least, if you could tell us more about the problems with guns, we would love to hear more here or on our other social media, as the team would like to take a closer look at that. Best regards - Aleksandra, Wenkly Studio

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ever
reviews.review_description:
I purchased the game today and played for many hours. The game has 4 different scenes. Zombies are coming in waves... Awesome guns and in co-op mode the game is great.
I am looking forward to the updates and new releases already.

Fantastic game. If we could have a default to the automatic pistols it would be even better. 

Also, moving joystick forward to teleport or using a button would be better.
This game is alot of fun, with the added benefit that you can play with 7 of your friends which is amazing. We need more games like this.
no fun at all, very boring

developer_response.body: We apologize the experience was not fully satisfying for you! Let me mark that our team has still much in plans when it comes to new additions and features (including more game modes!). We also appreciate any specific suggestions and feedback about how to improve.:) Kindest regards - Aleksandra, Wenkly Studio

reviews.review_description: Be warned…this game is addicting! This zombie shooting game puts you above the hoard. The zombies can’t touch you but they can still kill you with things they throw at you Teleporting from tower to tower takes a little getting used to but you’ll learn fast when that dynamite is thrown at you. Added bonus is the ability to play with up to 8 friends in CoOp mode.

This is a very satisfying game! It's not a horror survival, but it grows on you, and it's quickly become my most played game. Protecting the town by shooting the zombies is deeply satisfying. If you shoot their legs they can't throw the dynamite at you! I don't necessarily need a sight on every gun, but I agree with others that the pistols are hard to aim - even for this Texan. You get all the guns at the start, and although you do have to load them, you don't have to go through all that 'upgrade to a better gun' mess.  I've introduced at least six friends to this game and everyone got the basics within a few waves. And there is a real heart-pounding intensity when the hoard gets right up to the gate and you are the last one alive and desperate to make each shot count. And the community (which is just starting to grow)  in multiplayer games is friendly, helpful, welcoming, and sometimes super funny. I personally have not found any major glitches on Quest2.
Game does not work, cannot move from tower to tower. I request a refund

developer_response.body: Really sorry to hear any issues are preventing you from playing. If you could join our social media and share a video of that issue we could investigate it and help you for sure. Here is our discord: https://discord.gg/ArmHQakr.  Kindest regards - Aleksandra, Wenkly Studio

reviews.review_description: Very fun to play with different weapons and more beautiful graphics. Love this cool genre of vr game - Manual Tower Defense.
Smokes like a smokehouse smoker. Rocks rocks til you drop and never ever ever stops. Very good app.
Fell in love with elven assasin so decided to try private property. It's like exercise lol. I like it...enjoyable

It does take some practice to figure out teleportation and how to load the weapons, but this is overall a fun game. I prefer a game where you teleport as opposed to moving around as it causes a bit of dizziness for me. So this is great for me. I love the maps, but wish there were more options besides the four. The biggest drawback for this game has to be the difficulties in communicating with the other players sometimes. In a game where there can be up to 8 players, it becomes more and more challenging to be able to hear some of the other players, or they be able to hear you. Especially if you ever have to leave the game and try to jump back in sometimes it’s the person that actually started the game that has to leave and completely close the app and, then come back inin order to reset communication. Sometimes it might be the person with the highest score that has to leave and come back in before you can completely hear each other again. We’re not really sure just yet, but this seems to work most of the time. This is not convenient at all. There are a few other glitches in the game, but they really don’t seem to bother me much. But communication is key!

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your honest and detailed feedback about the game. We appreciate all remarks, including ones regarding teleportation as well as adding more maps. We are currently working on more features or more game modes, so we hope you stay with us to see them! When it comes to the glitches you mention, it would be fully appreciated if you shared some recordings or more info about them with us on our social media. We will be grateful! Kind regards - Aleksadra, Wenkly Studio

reviews.review_description:
Very hard to teleport fast enough to get out of bombs way. 
Loading guns glitchy.
Good scenes — so fix teleport and reloads and will be more fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback and informing us about potential issues you came across. We will take a deeper look at the loading and teleport problems you mentioned, and in the meantime, if you have any recordings or more detail, do not hesitate to share it with us via our social media. Kindest regards - Aleksandra

reviews.review_description: I love it. Just wishes it has spell like elven assassin does make it more fun.
